core_results.label: Head movement
core_results.interpretation: The sample value falls within the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
core_results.note: Lower values generally suggest more head stability through the swing window.

core_results.label: Hand path distance
core_results.interpretation: The sample value is below the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
core_results.note: Measures wrist-path movement from swing start to contact proxy.

core_results.label: Peak hand speed to contact
core_results.interpretation: The sample value falls within the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
core_results.note: Measures how many frames occur between peak wrist speed and the contact proxy.

experimental_results.label: Shoulder angle change
experimental_results.interpretation: The sample value is above the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
experimental_results.note: Experimental. Current angle calculation may suffer from wraparound artifacts.

experimental_results.label: Movement start to contact
experimental_results.interpretation: The sample value is below the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
experimental_results.note: Experimental. Sensitive to clip trimming, speed, and event detection quality.

experimental_results.label: Movement start to peak hand speed
experimental_results.interpretation: The sample value is below the middle 50% range of the pro baseline.
experimental_results.note: Experimental. Sensitive to clip trimming, speed, and event detection quality.
